task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Right Upper Quadrant and locates the gallbladder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 3D Slicer view showing the abdominal CT. Crosshairs or view should be centered on a pear-shaped, fluid-filled structure (gallbladder) near the liver margin.

task_completion.description: Agent measures the longitudinal length of the gallbladder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler or markup line visible on the image spanning the longest axis of the gallbladder (from fundus to neck).

task_completion.description: Agent measures the maximum transverse diameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler or markup line visible on the image spanning the widest point of the gallbladder, perpendicular to the long axis.

task_completion.description: Agent measures the gallbladder wall thickness.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A short measurement line placed across the gallbladder wall. The view may be zoomed in to show the wall clearly.

task_completion.description: Agent generates a JSON report with measurements and classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing a JSON object with keys 'measurements', 'findings', and 'classification'. Values should be filled in.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the measurement markups and the report to the correct paths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or terminal listing showing 'gallbladder_measurements.mrk.json' and 'gallbladder_report.json' in '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/'.

integrity.description: Agent must use the 3D Slicer GUI for measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Slicer interface with markup/ruler tools active, not just a script running in a terminal.

integrity.description: Report values must reflect actual measurements, not default examples.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the final JSON report should not exactly match the 'normal' thresholds (e.g., exactly 7.0cm or 3.0mm) unless the image supports it. They should look like specific measured data.

integrity.description: Measurements in the report must correspond to visual markups.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the report claims a measurement (e.g., wall thickening), the visual markups on the screen should exist and be placed on the relevant anatomy.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The gallbladder is a pear-shaped structure in the Right Upper Quadrant, identified by label index 9 in AMOS datasets. Normal clinical dimensions are: Wall Thickness <= 3.0 mm, Longitudinal Length <= 10.0 cm, Transverse Diameter <= 5.0 cm. Wall thickness > 3mm is a critical indicator for cholecystitis.
